# Legacy Index Snapshot

This document is retained only as a pointer for the ignored legacy archive.

The current `index.html` is a Vite shell that mounts `src/pages/IndexPage.tsx`. For current behavior, read [../examples/README.md](../examples/README.md).

The old static index page was copied to `legacy-static/index.html` with `legacy-static/static/styles.css`. Do not edit that archive as source; migrate any useful behavior into `src/pages` or `src/squircle`.
